title: Citrusy Gooey Jamaican Haddock Stir-fry
description: A date-night favorite that combines the warmth of haddock with the citrusy flavors and gooey texture from tempered cheese for a perfect comfort dish.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: for cooking and drizzling over the top

ingredients.name: Fresh orange zest
ingredients.notes: or 1/4 of a whole orange for extra citrus flavor

ingredients.name: Panko breadcrumbs
ingredients.notes: for coating the haddock and creating an outer layer of gooeyness

ingredients.name: Cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: cheddar, pre-cooked in a crispy form

instructions: Prepare all ingredients and ensure they are at room temperature for better flavor distribution.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the haddock fillets to the pan, gently pressing them into the oil so they won’t move around too much. Season with salt and pepper.
Once golden brown on both sides (about 2-3 minutes per side), remove from heat and set aside.

In a small mixing bowl, combine panko breadcrumbs and melted cheese to create a cheesy coating for your haddock. Sprinkle this over the tops of the fillets before drizzling with olive oil and fresh orange zest.
Return the coated haddock to the skillet and add water or chicken broth (if using). Bring to a simmer, cover partially with a lid, and reduce heat to low.
Let cook for about 5-7 minutes covered until cheese is fully melted and sauce slightly thickened. Stir gently with a spoon so not all pieces of haddock are submerged under the sauce.
Remove from heat and garnish if desired with additional fresh orange zest or parsley sprigs before serving.
Serve hot and enjoy your delicious Citrusy Gooey Jamaican Haddock Stir-fry!
